title: OpenCosmos QA Extension
description: STAC OpenCosmos Quality Assurance Extension for satellite imagery products. Applied to items in QA collections. Enforces that the item belongs to a QA collection (opencosmos:collection_type = 'qa') and, when an item is rejected, that the rejection reason, textual rejection codes and rejection type are present. Also captures geometric accuracy and image quality statistics produced by the QA pipeline.

oneOf.$comment: This is the schema for STAC Items.

allOf.$comment: When an item is rejected, the reason, textual codes and rejection type must all be present.

opencosmos:collection_type.title: Collection Type
opencosmos:collection_type.description: Type of collection containing this item. Must be 'qa' for items validated by this extension.

opencosmos:qa:assets_valid.title: Assets Valid
opencosmos:qa:assets_valid.description: Indicates whether all assets have passed validation checks.

opencosmos:qa:rejected.title: Rejected
opencosmos:qa:rejected.description: Indicates whether the item has been rejected during QA review.

opencosmos:qa:rejected_reason.title: Rejected Reason
opencosmos:qa:rejected_reason.description: Human-readable reason(s) explaining why the item was rejected. A single string or an array of strings when multiple checks failed.

opencosmos:qa:rejection_type.title: Rejection Type
opencosmos:qa:rejection_type.description: Whether the rejection was performed manually by an operator or automatically by the QA pipeline. Constrained to these two values for now.

opencosmos:qa:rejection_codes.title: Rejection Codes
opencosmos:qa:rejection_codes.description: Machine-readable textual codes identifying why the item was rejected. Codes are text, not numeric. One or more of the allowed values: band_coregistration (band co-registration issue), no_data (no data), scene_covered (scene covered by cloud/snow/etc.), calibration_image (calibration image), geometric_artifact (geometric artifact), other.

opencosmos:qa:coarse-geometric-check-pas.title: Coarse Geometric Check Passed
opencosmos:qa:coarse-geometric-check-pas.description: Indicates whether the coarse geometric consistency check passed.

opencosmos:qa:roll_angle_delta.title: Roll Angle Delta
opencosmos:qa:roll_angle_delta.description: Difference between the commanded and achieved roll angle, in degrees.

opencosmos:qa:geometric_accuracy:shift_c.title: Geometric Accuracy Shift CE90
opencosmos:qa:geometric_accuracy:shift_c.description: Circular Error at 90% confidence of the geolocation shift, in pixels. A value of -1 indicates the metric could not be computed.

opencosmos:qa:geometric_accuracy:shift_c.title: Geometric Accuracy Shift CE95
opencosmos:qa:geometric_accuracy:shift_c.description: Circular Error at 95% confidence of the geolocation shift, in pixels. A value of -1 indicates the metric could not be computed.

opencosmos:qa:geometric_accuracy:thresho.title: Geometric Accuracy Threshold Met
opencosmos:qa:geometric_accuracy:thresho.description: Indicates whether the geometric accuracy met the configured threshold.

color_stats.title: Color Statistics
color_stats.description: Color analysis statistics used to generate visually appealing true color images.

asset.title: Asset
asset.description: The asset key that was analyzed.

avg_saturation.title: Average Saturation
avg_saturation.description: Average saturation value across the image.

colorfulness_score.title: Colorfulness Score
colorfulness_score.description: Computed colorfulness score of the image.

colorfulness_threshold.title: Colorfulness Threshold
colorfulness_threshold.description: Threshold value used to determine if the image is colorful.

extreme_colors.title: Extreme Colors
extreme_colors.description: Count or percentage of extreme color values in the image.

high_saturation_pixels.title: High Saturation Pixels
high_saturation_pixels.description: Percentage of pixels with high saturation values.

is_colorful.title: Is Colorful
is_colorful.description: Whether the image is considered colorful based on the threshold.

recommendation.title: Recommendation
recommendation.description: Human-readable recommendation for color correction if needed.

unnatural_colors.title: Unnatural Colors
unnatural_colors.description: Percentage of pixels with unnatural color values.

noise_stats.title: Noise Statistics
noise_stats.description: Noise analysis statistics computed to assess image quality.

asset.title: Asset
asset.description: The asset key that was analyzed.

is_noisy.title: Is Noisy
is_noisy.description: Whether the image is considered noisy based on the threshold.

laplacian_variance.title: Laplacian Variance
laplacian_variance.description: Variance of the Laplacian, used as a sharpness/noise indicator.

noise_level.title: Noise Level
noise_level.description: Estimated noise level of the image.

noise_score.title: Noise Score
noise_score.description: Computed noise score of the image.

noise_threshold.title: Noise Threshold
noise_threshold.description: Threshold value used to determine if the image is noisy.

psnr.title: PSNR
psnr.description: Peak Signal-to-Noise Ratio of the image, in decibels.

std_deviation.title: Standard Deviation
std_deviation.description: Standard deviation of pixel values, used as a noise indicator.
